name: Octostrip FLEX 1m
comment:
Octostrip FLEX 1m is an IP65-rated RGBW strip with 8 controllable sections and a maximum power of 27 watts. It has a robust aluminum housing that also helps with convection cooling of the LEDs. Available accessories include black and white covers that also work as diffusers and cables in various lengths.

This is not a standalone LED strip, it must be controlled by the Showtec Controller for Octostrip FLEX.
